2606.21024.title: Negative Knowledge as Failure-aware Shared Memory for AutoResearch
2606.21024.paper_summary: AI-assisted research systems generate many failed attempts, but those failures rarely become a durable, shared knowledge asset. We propose a negative knowledge memory layer: a curator agent converts each failed attempt into a bounded, typed record in a shared bank, and a downstream research agent explicitly adopts or rejects those records before proposing its next experiment. We evaluate this layer in two settings: same-task retry on ScienceAgentBench and cross-task scientific research on two nonlinear math-physics PDE problems. The negative knowledge layer outperforms vanilla AutoResearch baselines while using fewer tokens; agents with the negative knowledge bank solve new tasks that all baselines fail to solve in PDE systems research. We also show that the previous negative knowledge bank can transfer and enhance AutoResearch on different PDE problems. These results suggest that structured negative knowledge is a knowledge asset that should be explicitly maintained in broader AI-engaged scientific research beyond a memory-compression or debugging aid, alongside positive findings, as a collective infrastructure for scientific memory. Code is available at https://github.com/hch-wang/Negative_Knowledge.
2606.21024.paper_summary_zh: AI輔助研究系統產生了許多失敗的嘗試，但這些失敗很少成為持久的共享知識資產。<lb/>我們提出了一個負知識記憶層：一個策展代理將每個失敗的嘗試轉換為共享庫中的有界類型記錄，而下游研究代理在提出下一個實驗之前明確地採納或拒絕這些記錄。<lb/>我們在兩個環境中評估這一層：在ScienceAgentBench上的同任務重試和在兩個非線性數學-物理PDE問題上的跨任務科學研究。<lb/>負知識層在使用更少的標記的同時，超越了普通AutoResearch基準；擁有負知識庫的代理能夠解決所有基準在PDE系統研究中無法解決的新任務。<lb/>我們還顯示，之前的負知識庫可以轉移並增強AutoResearch在不同PDE問題上的表現。<lb/>這些結果表明，結構化的負知識是一種應該在更廣泛的AI參與科學研究中明確維護的知識資產，除了作為記憶壓縮或調試輔助工具外，還應與正面發現一起作為科學記憶的集體基礎設施。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/hch-wang/Negative_Knowledge 獲得。
2606.21024.author: Hanchun Wang et.al.
